name: Amulet of Proof against Detection and Location
description: While wearing this amulet, you can't be targeted by Divination spells or perceived through magical scrying sensors unless you allow it.

effect.protection: Cannot be targeted by Divination spells
effect.scrying_immunity: Cannot be perceived through magical scrying sensors

attunement.description: You must attune to this amulet by wearing it for 1 hour.

activation.description: The magic functions automatically while attuned and wearing the amulet

notes: This amulet is invaluable for those trying to hide from magical detection or seeking privacy from divination magic.
